VERIFICATION PENDING

Your Application is Under Review

Thank you for submitting your vendor verification documents. Our team is reviewing your application.

What Happens Next

  • 1
    Document Review Our team verifies your business documents and information
  • 2
    Business Verification We may contact you for additional information if needed
  • 3
    Approval & Setup Once approved, you'll receive access to your vendor dashboard

Timeline

1-3 Business Days

Most applications are reviewed within 1-3 business days. You'll receive an email notification once your account is approved.
